stories.name: With Click Handler
stories.snippet: const WithClickHandler = () => <Button label="Click me" onClick={() => alert('Button clicked!')} />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <Button
    label="Click me"
    disabled
    onClick={() => alert('This should not trigger!')} />;
